metadata.name: Calculate Use Tax on Out-of-State Purchase

description: A business in California bought office furniture from an online retailer in Oregon (which has no sales tax) and needs to self-assess and pay California use tax.

nodes.task_description: Identify the total cost of the furniture purchased from the out-of-state vendor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the invoice for the purchase.

nodes.task_description: Look up the applicable use tax rate for the business's location in California.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct state and local use tax rate.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the use tax due and include it on the business's next sales and use tax return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the use tax and adds it to the return.
